title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Flipkart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Flipkart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Flipkart. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
